# clawdex

Personal contact index backed by markdown and private Git. Imports Apple, Google, X DMs, and Discord DMs.

Canonical pages:
- Clawdex — local-first contact index: https://clawdex.sh/

Source: https://github.com/openclaw/clawdex

Guidance for agents:
- Use this file as a site index, not a full-site corpus.
